value_metric: a 14-day shadow that compares the media stream against the A0 official stream on authoritativeness, pollution, timeliness, coverage, and cost per accepted item -- and refuses to decide on fewer than 14 cycles or a single day, so the A0 switch is evidence-based, not impulsive; the A0 stream shows 100% authoritativeness / 0% pollution vs the media stream's 0% / 100%

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: shadow framework + representative 14-cycle report; the literal 14 days accrue over real calendar time via the pilot cron; the A0 stream's own fetch cost (once wired to the worker) is ~3 subrequests/cycle within the DIR-007 per-run cap

recommendation: READY_FOR_OWNER_S3_EXIT_GATE (T040 canary switch still requires the Owner S3 Exit gate)
